title: Player Charge Jump
description: This mod ports the horse charge jump mechanic to the player.
body:
![Player Charge Jump](https://i.imgur.com/DFUlYsD.gif)
FEATURES
Horse-Style JumpingPorted directly from horses to the player. Jump over 1.5-height blocks without a horse
Jump Bar HUDThe vanilla horse jump bar appears on screen when charging, using the exact same textures
Smart Release DetectionThe bar fills up, hits the orange zone, then shrinks back if held too long. Release anywhere in the orange zone for the boost
Graceful FallbackMissing the sweet spot or overcharging still gives you a standard vanilla jump
HOW TO USE
Tap Space (without Shift)Normal vanilla jump, no change
Hold past the delayThe jump bar appears and starts filling
Release in the orange zoneYou launch at 1.5 height
Release outside the orange zone (too early or overcharged)Normal vanilla jump
CONFIGURATION
If you have Mod Menu installed, you can customize your experience:
Charge Delay (ticks)The amount of time the keybind must be held before the charging bar appears
Charge Speed (ticks)The duration required to fully fill the charge bar
REQUIREMENTS
- Fabric Loader - Fabric API - Cloth Config API (1.21.x) - YetAnotherConfigLib (26.x) - Mod Menu (recommended for easy in-game configuration)
CLIENT & SERVER
Some functionality exists on both the client and server, requiring the mod to be installed on both sides.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: - Leaving a rating/review - Sharing it with friends - Reporting any bugs you find
